get.description: Get the theme for a given store
Get the product information for a given productId
Get the shopper portal settings of the store

deliveryEveryStyle.description: custom CSS for the delivery frequency options

bgColor.description: The background color for the widget elements

bgColorOnSelection.description: Color for the product variant selection box

borders.description: The border properties for the widget elements

elements.description: The customized css selector for elements

customCss.description: The customized css styling for elements

onetimeFirst.description: Whether the One-Time purchase should show up first, relative to the other offer options position

onetimeCopy.description: The text for the One-Time Purchase option title

subscribeCopy.description: The text for the Subscription Offer option title

prepaidCopy.description: The text for the Prepaid Offer option title

rank.description: Order for the subscription offer options

currency.description: The currency used for the store

multilocation.description: You can set up multiple locations in your Shopify store so that you can track inventory and fulfill orders at your locations.

specialDiscountActive.description: Whether the subscription has any discount available

discountType.description: Description: By Quantity, By Orders or Free Shipping

shippingDiscount.description: Discount applied to the shipping (free shipping)

sellingPlanGroupId.description: The shopify selling plan group ID

optionOrder.description: The order of the selling plan relative to the other selling plans (in which position of the dropdown it should show up)

deliveryCadenceCount.description: Delivery frequency (if it's delivered every 2 weeks, then it's 2).

deliveryCadenceUnit.description: Delivery frequency unit (if it's every 2 months, then it's "MONTH")

billingCadenceCount.description: Billing frequency (if it's every 2 weeks, then it's 2)

billingCadenceUnit.description: Billing frequency unit (if it's every 2 weeks, then it's "WEEK")

name.description: The default name of the selling plan, displayed in the widget subscription offer options dropdown.

isDefault.description: Indicates whether the selling plan should be selected by default

discountCode.description: Discount code available for the selling plan.

optionType.description: Type of the selling plan, Note: use when type is "ONETIME_AND_SUBSCRIPTION_AND_PREPAID"

giftOptions.description: Contains the maximum number of deliveries for the gift purchase option

requires_selling_plan.description: Whether the product has subscription offers available.

selling_plans.description: Represents how a product can be sold and purchased.

hasVariantLevel.description: Whether the product has any variants level configuration available.

selling_plan_groups.description: Represents a selling method (for example, "Subscribe and save" or "Pre-paid").

pauseDurationModifier.description: The cadence unit for the pause duration

pauseDurationCount.description: The number of cadence units for the pause duration

reactivationDate.description: The date the subscription will be reactivated

change_delivery_date.description: Whether the shopper can change delivery date

change_delivery.description: Whether the shopper can change delivery

change_quantity.description: Whether the shopper can change quantity

add_on.description: Whether the shopper can add on item

gift_delivery.description: Whether the shopper can create gift delivery

pauseLimitSettings.description: The pause limit settings for the store
